headline: How Investors May Respond To Arthur J. Gallagher (AJG) Embedding AI Into Its Benefits Consulting Platform
summary: Earlier this month, Arthur J. Gallagher introduced new AI-enabled benefits capabilities within its Benefits & HR Consulting advisory model, offering personalized, conversational guidance for employees and deeper analytics on benefits utilization, cost drivers and plan performance for employers. By embedding these AI tools into its Gallagher Drive ecosystem and building them on the Avante platform, the company is expanding its advisory toolkit with data-rich, scalable HR support that can help...
